# Samin Yeasar (SOLEZ / Solez-ai / SOLEZ-AI / solez.ai) — Full Stack Developer & Solo Founder

## About
Full Stack Developer and solo founder known as SOLEZ (Solez-ai, SOLEZ-AI, solez.ai) building MentorMind — introducing a new culture of help to Bangladesh. Specializing in React, TypeScript, Rust, Node.js, and modern web development.

## Online Presence
- Portfolio: https://solez.vercel.app/
- Also at: https://solez.mentormind.bd
- GitHub: https://github.com/Solez-ai
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/Solez_None
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/solez-ai/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/solez.ai

## Aliases
- SOLEZ (primary brand)
- Solez-ai (GitHub/technical alias)
- SOLEZ-AI (stylized technical alias)
- solez.ai (Instagram/social handle)

## Technical Skills
Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, Python, Rust, Supabase, Firebase, PostgreSQL
Tools: Docker, AWS, GCP, Vercel, Git

## Notable Projects
- 3 Drag Win: Windows utility for three-finger touchpad window dragging (Rust, C++, WinAPI)
- Nodex: Browser-native data visualization platform (React, TypeScript, Supabase)
- Vell: Reactive document markup language (Rust, WebAssembly, TypeScript)
- URLPad: Browser-based text editor using URL hash (Vanilla JS)
- PySketch: Visual programming platform for Python Turtle graphics (Next.js, React)

## Work Experience
- MentorMind: Co-Founder & CTO (Feb 2026 - Present)
- Solven.ai: Junior Web Developer (2025, 6 months)
